title: zanthoxylum obcordatum
intro: Zanthoxylum obcordatum, also known as the Hawaiian prickly ash, is a shrub-like plant native to the Hawaiian Islands. It belongs to the Rutaceae family and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, Zanthoxylum obcordatum is often used as a tea, infused oil, or dried powder, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
